title: Complexity Classes, Reductions, and Feasibility Boundaries
description: Explain why a requested exact optimizer needs changed scope or a bounded alternative. Learners cumulatively produce a feasibility and reduction decision memo through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Translate optimization questions to decision form without losing the threshold meaning.
Describe polynomial verification and solution concepts without claiming unresolved equalities.
Map instances and answers through a polynomial reduction in the correct hardness direction.
